subcodes.first_line: O scion of His Holiness Mansur! Thy missive, like unto an unfurled scroll, brought forth joy and gladness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای سلیل حضرت منصور ورق مسطور مانند رق منشور مورث فرح و سرور گردید
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for children and youth, @naming of children; of individuals, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
